# Homelab Palace (Benchmark Fixture)

Memory palace for homelab infrastructure. This is the Locus-structured
equivalent of tests/fixtures/flat/MEMORY.md — identical facts, navigable rooms.

## Project Rooms

| Room | Description | Path |
|---|---|---|
| `homelab-iac` | Proxmox nodes, K3s cluster, 1Password setup, Flux GitOps, key files | `projects/homelab-iac/` |
